2. Verify the request is rejected

column5:
Manual UI:
1. Login as an administrator in two browser sessions
2. Open the same proposal detail in both sessions
3. Change status in the first session
4. Try to change status from the stale second session
5. Verify the approved conflict message and latest state
column6: The stale request is rejected with the approved safe conflict message and latest state is shown without automatic retry
